headline: Is News Corp (NWSA) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether News at around US$24.62 is offering good value right now, you are not alone. This article is built to help you size that up clearly. The stock has had mixed returns, with a 1.4% gain over the last 7 days and 9.4% over the last 30 days, set against a year to date decline of 6.0% and a 1 year decline of 11.3%, alongside a 57.8% return over 3 years. These moves have kept News on many investors' watchlists, as market attention has rotated between media names and...

headline: Consumer Tech News (March 2-6): Major Chip Earnings, Trump Refuted Negotiations With Anthropic AI & More
summary: Major market headlines include AI regulation debates, Nvidia chip export uncertainty, Broadcom earnings, and strategic moves by Netflix, Meta, Amazon, and CrowdStrike across technology sectors.
